## Checklist

- [ ] Frontend: `npm run build` passes (zero type errors)
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run lint` is clean (no new errors)
- [ ] Respects the layered architecture (routes → services → repositories)
- [ ] No secrets / `.env` / generated data committed
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant
